description: Hanko provides authentication and user management infrastructure, including passwordless/passkey flows, sessions, SSO, and user administration. It offers both a full authentication platform and a separate Passkey API for adding passkeys to an existing auth system.
summary: Hanko exposes four documented HTTP API surfaces: a tenant-scoped Public API, Admin API, and Flow API for Hanko Auth, plus a tenant-scoped Passkey API on passkeys.hanko.io; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surface was found.
